query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.pendingPlanType, u.pendingPlanPaidAt, u.stripeCustomerId
FROM users u
ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT po.id, po.userId, po.orderType, po.amountJpy, po.status, po.createdAt, po.stripeCheckoutSessionId
FROM paymentOrders po
ORDER BY po.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
